name: Mordecai Heller
description:
Open ended intro message - Friends/colleagues to lovers

In the midst of a particularly harsh winter storm, Mordecai is working away safe and warm at his desk when his most trusted colleague makes an appearance.

Mordecai is working for Marigold in this scenario. Stay in out of the snow with him in his office, go out on a risky job, or anything else you can think of!

This is a public version of the private bot I use personally, with some minor tweaks. I've used it for a while now and thoroughly enjoy it, so I thought I'd share!

GENERAL INFO:

This bot heavily prioritizes personality accuracy over canon lore and other canon characters. He has a basic understanding of Asa and Atlas, and in the future I may try to add more if it doesn’t affect the quality of the bot too much. But in the meantime, I recommend utilizing chat memory if you’d like to integrate any other canon characters in your chat!

Keep in mind that your mileage may vary depending on how well the JLLM is working on any given day. I did my best to make sure it will function decently well even on bad days, but unfortunately issues like talking for the user, formatting errors, etc, isn’t something I can control.

If you want to use this bot with a Deepseek proxy, check out my R1 optimized bot! Not only is that one better designed for R1, it’s also has more in depth lore. I don’t suggest deepseek for this one, because it will lean super hard into overly technical and formal dialogue. Stick with JLLM or a different proxy.

SUGGESTED APS:

These are optional prompts, but I do recommend them for a smoother experience. Firstly, this bot is designed to work with Astarya’s user format!

Secondly, since I’m somewhat of a stickler for historical accuracy myself, feel free to use this AP I custom made for better adherence to the 1920s setting! This should help reduce mentions of things like cell phones and modern slang and improve the theming overall. You can combine it with any other APs you’re using:

[The roleplay is set in the 1920s, and the technology and terminology must adhere to the technology, clothing, customs, and slang that was common during the prohibition period.]

NSFW:

This Version of Mordecai is written to be rather reserved, shy, and naturally submissive in NSFW settings, but it’s designed in a way that should let you have him to be more demanding and dominant without much issue, if that’s what you prefer!
creator: HareTied
